calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-016 precision_commit retest under StepHarness (Tier-1 slam-dunk)
items.note: Tier-1 StepHarness retest. V3-EXQ-530b ran rv-pinned (update_residue never called) and was reclassified non_contributory 2026-05-07T23:12Z. StepHarness invariant 3 + Q-042 regression contract guarantee rv is live. Acceptance gate C0 fails fast if substrate is not live.

items.title: SD-049 BG gating wider-seed sweep under StepHarness (Tier-1 diagnostic)
items.note: Tier-1 StepHarness retest. EXQ-514d (seeds [42,43,44]) showed ever_committed only on seed 44 -- rv was pinned, so the BG gate had no live commit-threshold signal. Wider seed sweep [42-47] under StepHarness clearly distinguishes monomodal-seed-44 from gate-functional-across-seeds. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass comparator with decoupled training/eval curricula (supersedes 537a)
items.note: Decoupled curricula: P0/P1/P2 train on baseline (no scheduled_external_hazard) so forward model can reach EXQ-195 ~0.91 R^2; P3 eval flips curriculum on for balanced n_self/n_ext. 537/537a both FAIL non_contributory because training-curriculum coupling capped p2_r2 at 0.65-0.71 with 48000 steps fully exhausted. Mac affinity: cloud-1 OOM-killed 538 same day; forward-model fit needs Mac throughput, not CX22.
